issue.title: Speaker not responding after firmware update
issue.body:
After updating my SoundTouch 300 firmware to the latest version, the speaker stops responding to commands from the app. I have tried restarting the speaker and the app, but the issue persists.

**Device**: SoundTouch 300
**OS**: Android 14
**Steps to reproduce**:
1. Update firmware
2. Open app
3. Try to control speaker

**Expected**: Speaker responds to commands
**Actual**: No response, timeout after 10 seconds
